title: Hermes Agentic OS is Insane... just watch
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to build an agentic operating system that integrates Hermes, Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI tools in one place. The system includes features like context isolation, a dreaming function for overnight insights, persona management, memory stack, and a dashboard for monitoring AI spending and artifacts across all connected tools.
